CVE-2015-5237.title: protobuf allows remote authenticated attackers to cause a heap-ba ...
CVE-2015-5237.description: protobuf allows remote authenticated attackers to cause a heap-based buffer overflow.

CVE-2021-22570.title: Nullptr dereference when a null char is present in a proto symbol ...
CVE-2021-22570.description: Nullptr dereference when a null char is present in a proto symbol. The symbol is parsed incorrectly, leading to an unchecked call into the proto file's name during generation of the resulting error message. Since the symbol is incorrectly parsed, the file is nullptr. We recommend upgrading to version 3.15.0 or greater.

CVE-2025-4565.title: Any project that uses Protobuf Pure-Python backend to parse untru ...
CVE-2025-4565.description: Any project that uses Protobuf Pure-Python backend to parse untrusted Protocol Buffers data containing an arbitrary number of recursive groups, recursive messages or a series of SGROUP tags can be corrupted by exceeding the Python recursion limit. This can result in a Denial of service by crashing the application with a RecursionError. We recommend upgrading to version =>6.31.1 or beyond commit 17838beda2943d08b8a9d4df5b68f5f04f26d901

CVE-2025-53605.title: The protobuf crate before 3.7.2 for Rust allows uncontrolled recu ...
CVE-2025-53605.description: The protobuf crate before 3.7.2 for Rust allows uncontrolled recursion in the protobuf::coded_input_stream::CodedInputStream::skip_group parsing of unknown fields in untrusted input.
